status: height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 28px 0 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary);
addr-value: font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-primary); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
bag: margin-left: auto; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 18px; background: var(--teal); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
search-pill: display: flex; align-items: center; height: 46px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--surface-1); border: 0.5px solid var(--divider); padding: 0 18px; gap: 10px;
plus-cta: font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; color: #003733; background: var(--teal); padding: 7px 12px; border-radius: 999px;
cat: flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 7px;
cat-ic: width: 54px; height: 54px; border-radius: 16px; background: var(--surface-2); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
sec-h: font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-primary); margin: 4px 0 14px; letter-spacing: -0.3px;
rest-photo: width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 5/3; border-radius: 14px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
plus-badge: position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; background: var(--teal); color: #003733; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 900; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 6px; letter-spacing: -0.1px;
heart: position: absolute; top: 10px; right: 10px; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
rest-rating: margin-left: auto; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-primary);
rest-fee: display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-primary); font-weight: 700; margin-top: 8px; background: var(--surface-2); padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 999px;
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; color: #888; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; gap: 4px; letter-spacing: 0.1px;
